marker_descriptions.external: Tests around external source boundaries or downloader modules; not skipped by default.
marker_descriptions.non_executing: Audits, docs, configuration, validation, and status checks that do not execute source recovery.
marker_descriptions.pipeline_gate: Production, pause, recovery, blocker, or phase-gate invariant tests.
marker_descriptions.slow: Long-running tests reserved for future use; not applied by this phase.
marker_descriptions.unit: Pure logic tests with minimal filesystem or process coupling.
